calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-24-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Matthew B. Lee, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Richard Rudy, Larry Siefken, Rudolph Sims and William Smejkal, who were not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Hamilton Materials, Inc.
Default entered against defendant on April 2, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, July 24, 2008.
Order waiving the appearance of witnesses at the default prove-up hearing was filed on July 17, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Richard Rudy, Larry Siefken, Rudolph Sims and William Smejkal, and against the Defaulted Defendant, Hamilton Materials, Inc. as follows:

Interest as to Plaintiff Richard Rudy - $167.81.
Interest as to Plaintiff Larry Siefken - $287.67.
Interest as to Plaintiff Rudolph Sims - $287.67.
Interest as to Plaintiff William Smejkal - $167.81.
Costs - $380.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $1,290.96.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-30-2008 Continued To Aug-22-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2008 Continued To Jun-06-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
